name: O-12 scaffolds behavior: scaffold.sh --dry-run does not create target dir (§2.14 contract)
command: rm -rf /tmp/o12-target; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/scaffold.sh" --kind next-saas --target /tmp/o12-target --dry-run 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && [ ! -d /tmp/o12-target ] && echo dry_safe 1>&2
